/usr/bin/ar qc libmwal.a CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/slice.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/status.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/util/coding.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/util/crc32c.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/env/env_posix.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/file/writable_file_writer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/file/sequential_file_reader.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/log/log_writer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/log/log_reader.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/write_batch.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/wal_edit.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/wal_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/write_thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/write_coalescer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/wal_compressor.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/db_wal.cc.o CMakeFiles/mwal.dir/src/wal/wal_iterator.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmwal.a
